name: Bio-Char Enhanced Microbial Fuel Cells with BMS
description: This project develops biochar-based Microbial Fuel Cells (MFCs) to generate electricity from organic waste. Biochar acts as a low-cost, sustainable electrode that improves electron transfer and microbial activity. A Battery Management System (BMS) stores and stabilizes the generated power, enabling it to run small devices like an RC car.

name: Sugar Derived Biomimetic Polymer Column For Wastewater Treatment
description: This project develops a sugar-derived biomimetic polymer column for wastewater purification. The eco-friendly system combines adsorption, hydrophobic oil trapping, and flocculation to remove dyes, heavy metals, microplastics, and oils simultaneously. It is regenerable, cost-effective, and scalable, offering a sustainable alternative to conventional water treatment technologies.

name: Co Doped V2O5 Sensor Monitoring System
description: This project develops a low-cost dual gas sensing system to detect ammonia (NH₃) and hydrogen sulfide (H₂S) using Co-doped V₂O₅ sensors on graphite electrodes. An Arduino processes resistance changes to monitor gas concentration in real time, while a humidity sensor improves accuracy. The system enhances safety monitoring in industrial and environmental settings

name: Sorbent Semi-Autonomous Marine Drifter
description: Sorbent Semi – Autonomous Marine Drifter (SSAMD) is an IoT-based RC boat designed to clean oil spills from water bodies. Using metal disc skimmers, sensors, and an ESP32 controller, it collects oil while providing real-time monitoring. The system is portable, cost-effective, and enables remote operation for efficient small-scale oil spill cleanup.

name: AeroVolt Design and Fabrication
description: The AeroVolt project develops a compact aerodynamic test rig to study how a blade behaves under controlled airflow. It uses a bell-shaped inlet, dual honeycomb flow straighteners, and a contraction section to create smooth, stable air. This setup helps analyze blade strength, vibration, and efficiency safely and accurately.
